problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Vagus. Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
